model cards {
  id                                       String        @id
  workspace_id                             String
  type                                     CardType
  label                                    String
  description                              String?
  position                                 Json          @default("{\"x\": 0, \"y\": 0}")
  phase                                    ProjectPhase?
  status                                   CardStatus    @default(DRAFT)
  priority                                 Priority      @default(MEDIUM)
  metadata                                 Json          @default("{}")
  tags                                     String[]
  validated                                Boolean       @default(false)
  validated_at                             DateTime?
  created_at                               DateTime      @default(now())
  updated_at                               DateTime
  workspaces                               workspaces    @relation(fields: [workspace_id], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  connections_connections_source_idTocards connections[] @relation("connections_source_idTocards")
  connections_connections_target_idTocards connections[] @relation("connections_target_idTocards")

  @@index([phase])
  @@index([status])
  @@index([type])
  @@index([workspace_id])
  @@schema("public")
}

model connections {
  id                                 String         @id
  workspace_id                       String

- Lab queries (filtering cards by type) now use composite index
- User dashboard (my active projects) optimized
- Conversation lookups significantly faster
- All critical query paths covered
